libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native test runtime system properties for 5.0.1 as for the existing 5.0.0 scaffold: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Prefer local Vert.x HttpServer endpoints for GET/POST, JSON codecs, forms/multipart, redirects, sessions, caching, and streaming; no Docker service is needed. Avoid OAuth2WebClient unless deliberately adding its optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The failing issue is specifically a native-image run on JDK 25/current-defaults, so JVM tests alone may pass without exposing the missing Netty runtime properties.
Keep the unsafe-access properties scoped to Vert.x 5.0.x or the Netty 4.2.x path; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Resolved vertx-web-client 5.0.1 uses Vert.x core 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final; normal WebClient coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server, but Java 25 native runs need Netty unsafe-access system properties.
